title: Asset Manifest
description: Describes one image/video asset and whether it may be used as a Seedance primary input (start_image/end_image). Read by workspace/scripts/validate-seedance-input.py. See references/known-failure-patterns.md FP-001 for why this exists.

role.description: What job this asset does in the pipeline.

seedance_input_allowed.description: Must be true for this asset to pass validate-seedance-input.py. blender_previs/viewport_screenshot/blender_render with role=composition_only must always be false.

source_path.description: Repo-relative path to the actual image/video file.

known_failure_checked_at.description: Timestamp proving references/known-failure-patterns.md was checked before this asset is used for Seedance.

learning_preflight.description: Path to learning-preflight.md that contains can_prepare_seedance_request: true.

source_handoff.description: Path to visual-handoff.json if this asset came from Blender-previs-to-storyboard flow.

examples.notes: Composition/camera reference only. Never a Seedance primary input.
Approved by user after side-by-side review against Blender panels.
